# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://microservice1.internal
    routes:
      - name: route1
        paths:
          - /api/service1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          limit_by: consumer
  - name: service2
    url: http://microservice2.internal
    routes:
      - name: route2
        paths:
          - /api/service2
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
    plugins:
      - name: jwt
        config:
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
  - name: service3
    url: http://microservice3.internal
    routes:
      - name: route3
        paths:
          - /api/service3
        methods:
          - DELETE
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
